message:
feat(federation): add Karmada provider (PR C) (#9394)

Implement the Karmada federation provider following the same plugin
pattern as OCM (PR B). Reads cluster.karmada.io/v1alpha1 Clusters and
policy.karmada.io/v1alpha1 PropagationPolicies. Maps Ready condition
to joined/pending state, extracts apiEndpoint and taints, and converts
PropagationPolicy clusterAffinity into selector-kind groups.

Adds demo data for Karmada hub, clusters, group, and pending join.

Part of the multi-cluster federation plan (Issue 9368).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

+const FIVE_MINUTES_MS = 300_000;
+const TEN_MINUTES_MS = 600_000;
+

+  {

+    requestedAt: new Date(Date.now() - TEN_MINUTES_MS).toISOString(),
+    detail: 'Cluster Ready condition is not True',
+  },
 ]
